peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
dominance_test: Not dominated by any A-share CXO peer because it has the broadest global end-to-end CRDMO platform and the clearest late-stage and commercial project funnel.
moat_summary: Moat comes from integrated discovery; chemistry; testing; biology; D&M; TIDES; global quality systems; customer trust; project continuity; and scale efficiency.
advantage_summary: 2025 overall gross margin 47.64%; net margin 42.53%; ROE 28.56%; cash-flow-to-revenue 37.85%. D&M pipeline includes thousands of molecules and commercial or late-stage projects. The platform is not easy to rebuild with capital alone because quality systems; client history; process know-how; and regulatory trust compound over time.
weakness_summary: Geopolitical risk is material. BIOSECURE implementation and U.S. customer exposure must be treated as core risk rather than ignored. One-off investment gains also need decomposition.
market_position_summary: A-share challenged case. 2025 annual report coverage shows revenue RMB 45.456bn; parent net profit RMB 19.151bn; D&M pipeline scale; and CRDMO focus. Legal and SEC sources indicate the 2026 BIOSECURE framework creates designation risk but did not directly name WuXi as of early 2026.
source_backed_evidence: Annual report plus legal and regulatory risk sources.
source_quality: Do you agree 药明康德 should be the CXO core watch despite geopolitical risk?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
dominance_test: Not a weak copy of 药明康德 because its platform is smaller but shows distinct lab-service to CMC and clinical service conversion and commercial CDMO progress.
moat_summary: Moat comes from integrated lab services; CMC small-molecule CDMO; clinical CRO and SMO; biologics and CGT services; existing-customer conversion; and global delivery sites.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 34.83%; net margin 11.03%; ROE 11.60%; revenue RMB 14.095bn. Research summaries cite lab-service high margin; CMC order growth; FDA-audited API facilities; and a 2026 GLP-1 commercial manufacturing agreement.
weakness_summary: Scale and profitability remain below 药明康德. Clinical CRO and CGT services are lower-margin or early-stage. Overseas policy risk remains.
market_position_summary: 2025 reports show revenue growth 14.8%; new orders above 14%; more than 3300 global customers; more than 950 new customers; and over 84% of CDMO revenue from drug-discovery customers.
source_backed_evidence: Annual report summary plus professional research summaries.
source_quality: Should 康龙化成 be retained as the second integrated A-share CXO platform?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
archetype: 小分子CDMO与新兴业务平台
dominance_test: Not dominated by 康龙化成 or 九洲药业 because 凯莱英 has stronger small-molecule CDMO margins and more visible commercial and emerging-modality technology depth.
moat_summary: Moat comes from high-value small-molecule CDMO; continuous chemistry; photoelectrochemistry; high-throughput screening; commercial project experience; and expansion into ADC; peptides; oligonucleotides; and biologics.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 41.99%; net margin 16.89%; debt ratio 12.98%. Research summaries cite small-molecule CDMO revenue RMB 4.735bn and gross margin 46.83%; emerging business revenue RMB 1.93bn and gross margin 30.1%.
weakness_summary: Single large-order volatility and global biotech funding cycles can affect utilization. Transition into new modalities still needs sustained customer validation.
market_position_summary: 2025 coverage reports full-year revenue RMB 6.67bn; parent net profit RMB 1.13bn; 59 commercial projects; 515 clinical and preclinical projects; and 70 phase III projects.
source_backed_evidence: Annual-report coverage plus professional research summaries.
source_quality: Do you agree 凯莱英 should be retained as the high-margin small-molecule CDMO anchor?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
dominance_test: Not dominated by 药明康德 because 泰格's core is clinical trial operations; site network; MRCT experience; data statistics; imaging; and SMO rather than chemistry CRDMO.
moat_summary: Moat may come from clinical project management; hospital and site network; regulatory execution; MRCT experience; data management; and long-term sponsor trust.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 27.41%; net margin 11.78%; debt ratio 14.47%. Company sources report China clinical outsourcing leadership; MRCT experience; over 180 offices and branches; more than 10000 professionals; and 2025 new contracts RMB 10.16bn with backlog RMB 18.20bn.
weakness_summary: Clinical CRO price competition reduced margins. Some profit growth came from investment gains while扣非 profit fell sharply. Site-management work may be more labor-intensive and easier to replicate than chemistry CDMO.
market_position_summary: Company press release and annual-report coverage report 2025 revenue RMB 6.833bn; market share leadership in China clinical outsourcing; new orders up 20.6%; and backlog up 15.3%.
source_backed_evidence: Company annual report and company press release plus financial coverage.
source_quality: Should 泰格医药 be retained as a clinical CRO leader despite margin pressure?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
dominance_test: Potentially dominated by 凯莱英 in small-molecule CDMO unless 九洲's customer projects; specialty API base; and new peptide or conjugation platforms are accepted as distinct.
moat_summary: Moat may come from CDMO project funnel; API manufacturing experience; process optimization; multi-site production; and emerging peptide; conjugation; and small nucleic-acid platforms.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 36.85%; net margin 13.23%; cash-flow-to-revenue 33.12%. Research summaries cite 2025 CDMO gross margin about 41.08% and CDMO revenue RMB 4.176bn.
weakness_summary: Large customer product cycle and patent expiry can pressure revenue. R&D intensity is moderate and it may be a smaller CDMO peer if no independent niche is accepted.
market_position_summary: 2025 annual report and coverage show revenue RMB 5.509bn; net profit RMB 730mn; CDMO profitability improvement; and ongoing innovative-drug CDMO capacity projects.
source_backed_evidence: Annual report plus professional research summaries.
source_quality: Should 九洲药业 be retained as a separate CDMO/API platform or rejected because 凯莱英 covers the small-molecule CDMO slot?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
archetype: 分子砌块与生命科学试剂到CDMO平台
dominance_test: Not a direct CDMO peer if the accepted thesis is high-margin molecular building blocks and tool compounds. Could be dominated in CDMO by larger peers if the front-end platform is ignored.
moat_summary: Moat may come from large SKU library; molecule design and synthesis; high-margin tool compounds; published-citation flywheel; overseas customer channels; and transition to ADC or CDMO orders.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 47.10%; net margin 8.05%; R&D ratio 8.26%. Research coverage cites front-end reagent revenue growth; front-end gross margin around 61.9%; and about 149k SKU reserves by 2025 year end.
weakness_summary: Back-end CDMO capacity is still ramping and can dilute margins. Inventory and cash-flow quality need monitoring.
market_position_summary: 2025 coverage reports revenue RMB 2.877bn; parent net profit RMB 240mn;扣非 net profit up 38.1%; and strong growth in high-margin front-end life-science reagents.
source_backed_evidence: Annual report coverage plus professional research summaries.
source_quality: Do you accept 分子砌块 and tool-compound platform as a separate watch thesis?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
archetype: 分子砌块与药物发现到CDMO平台
dominance_test: May be dominated by 皓元医药 in front-end molecule libraries and by 凯莱英 or 九洲 in CDMO unless high-complexity building blocks and new molecular entity services are accepted.
moat_summary: Moat may come from high-complexity molecular building blocks; custom synthesis; drug-discovery libraries; CDMO extension; green chemistry; flow chemistry; biocatalysis; metal catalysis; and oligonucleotide or peptide platforms.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 30.82%; net margin 9.31%; cash-flow-to-revenue 33.80%; debt ratio 14.17%. Research and IR materials show the discovery-stage business has much higher margins than the development and commercial-stage CDMO business.
weakness_summary: The shift toward CDMO lowers gross margin. Need confirm that building-block IP and customer stickiness remain strong enough versus 皓元医药.
market_position_summary: 2025 annual-report coverage shows revenue RMB 1.974bn; parent net profit RMB 184mn; operating cash flow RMB 667mn; and 2026Q1 order growth above 20% according to IR materials.
source_quality: Should 药石科技 be retained as a molecular-building-block specialist or rejected because 皓元医药 is the cleaner peer?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
archetype: 药物研发服务与自主研发转型平台
dominance_test: Could be a specialized domestic drug R&D service platform but may be dominated by larger CXO platforms if its advantage is only labor and local hospital relationships.
moat_summary: Moat may come from one-stop preclinical plus clinical services; high R&D personnel ratio; patent and project accumulation; and transition from generic-drug CRO to innovative-drug R&D services.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 54.12%; net margin 17.22%; ROE 18.36%; R&D ratio 13.22%. These metrics are strong for a small platform and suggest the business is not merely low-value outsourcing.
weakness_summary: Scale is much smaller than leaders. The company has higher domestic policy and generic-drug R&D exposure. Need verify whether innovative-drug transition is durable.
market_position_summary: 2025 coverage reports revenue and profit growth; 2025 new orders above RMB 2.02bn; about 500 hospital partnerships; 22 resident points; and gross margin above 54%.
source_backed_evidence: Annual report coverage plus company result coverage.
source_quality: Should 阳光诺和 be retained as a high-margin specialized domestic R&D service platform?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
archetype: 非临床安全性评价CRO平台
dominance_test: May be dominated by broader CRO platforms unless GLP safety evaluation; animal facilities; and regulatory compliance are accepted as a separate niche.
moat_summary: Moat may come from GLP toxicology and safety evaluation facilities; regulatory compliance; animal model and pathology expertise; and long-cycle sponsor trust.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 20.71%; net margin 17.97%; cash-flow-to-revenue 26.82%. However annual-report notes show experimental service contribution was negative due to competitive pressure and lower margin. Profit quality includes non-operating or biological-asset effects that need decomposition.
weakness_summary: Main service margins are under pressure. Competitors can build capacity with capital and talent over time. Current profit is not clean evidence of moat.
market_position_summary: 2025 annual-report coverage shows revenue RMB 1.658bn; revenue down 17.87%; parent net profit up 302%; and management discussion of competition and margin pressure in laboratory services.
source_quality: Should 昭衍新药 be retained for regulated nonclinical safety evaluation or rejected until laboratory-service margin recovers?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
dominance_test: Dominated by 凯莱英 and 九洲药业 unless future evidence shows a differentiated customer or technical niche.
moat_summary: Moat is not clearly strong enough in current evidence. It has CDMO experience and improving revenue but not enough margin or customer evidence to displace stronger retained peers.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 29.94%; net margin 0.89%; ROE 1.83%. Revenue recovered but profit quality remains weak.
weakness_summary: The likely issue is not just cycle trough; the company has not yet shown durable margin or differentiated technical leadership versus stronger CDMO peers.
market_position_summary: 2025 coverage reports revenue RMB 3.035bn and net loss pressure in annual results. The company is optimizing customer structure and efficiency but current evidence remains turnaround oriented.
source_quality: Do you agree to reject 博腾股份 for now unless a stronger differentiated CDMO thesis appears?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
dominance_test: Dominated by 药明康德; 康龙化成; and possibly 昭衍新药 because current evidence does not show a clearly superior niche.
moat_summary: Moat may exist in preclinical CRO execution but current economics do not prove durable differentiation.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 17.36%; net margin -14.43%; ROE -8.26%; R&D ratio 8.98%. Losses and weak margin show that current technical service capability is not protecting economics against industry competition.
weakness_summary: Current evidence looks like a competitive CRO downturn rather than a high-barrier platform temporarily under-earning. Need order and margin recovery before watchlist inclusion.
market_position_summary: Local financial data show revenue RMB 1.163bn and parent net loss RMB 168mn in 2025. Public evidence does not yet prove a moat beyond broader CRO demand recovery.
source_backed_evidence: Local financial data plus company disclosure follow-up needed.
source_quality: Reject for now unless you think preclinical CRO capacity should be observed despite weak margins?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
archetype: CRO与生物医药服务恢复期平台
dominance_test: Dominated by broader and cleaner CXO platforms under current evidence.
moat_summary: Moat is not clear enough. There may be CRO service capability but profitability and scale do not prove a durable platform.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 28.61%; net margin 1.19%; ROE 1.09%. A regulatory document comparing CRO peers shows the company had lower historical gross margin and weaker扣非 profitability than stronger peers.
weakness_summary: The business appears to be in recovery rather than having a clear hard-to-replicate niche. Larger CXO platforms can likely compete effectively.
market_position_summary: Local financial data and regulatory materials support weak margin and profit evidence relative to peers.
source_backed_evidence: Regulatory material plus local financial data.
source_quality: Do you agree 睿智医药 should be rejected for now?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
archetype: 药物研发CRO与创新管线转型平台
dominance_test: Potentially differentiated in innovative pipeline transition but current CRO/CDMO economics are too weak versus retained R&D service platforms.
moat_summary: Moat may come from drug R&D service know-how and self-developed pipelines but the listed-company economics do not yet prove durable competitiveness.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 39.50%; net margin -13.33%; operating cash-flow-to-revenue -22.81%; R&D ratio 28.00%. High R&D intensity is real but losses and revenue decline indicate the business model is not yet proven.
weakness_summary: CRO revenue fell and innovative-pipeline optionality should not substitute for proven outsourcing moat. It may fit an innovative-drug pipeline group rather than CXO quality watch.
market_position_summary: 2025 coverage reports revenue down 15.45%; larger net loss; CRO business decline; and some 2026Q1 improvement plus class I and class II IND pipeline progress.
source_quality: Reject for now from CXO watch and revisit only if innovative-pipeline economics become clearer?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
archetype: SMO临床试验现场服务平台
dominance_test: Dominated by 泰格医药's broader clinical CRO and SMO ecosystem under current evidence.
moat_summary: Moat may come from site network and execution management but SMO is more labor and process intensive than high-technology CXO services.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 25.87%; net margin 13.01%; ROE 8.96%. Profit is acceptable but business concentration in SMO is very high and technology barrier appears lower.
weakness_summary: A funded clinical CRO or hospital-site network operator could replicate much of the service model over time. It does not currently justify a separate quality watch slot.
market_position_summary: 2025 coverage says SMO business was 99.90% of revenue and CRO expansion remained tiny. This supports rejection from high-barrier CXO watch.
source_quality: Do you agree 普蕊斯 should be rejected because SMO site service is lower-barrier and covered by 泰格医药?

peer_group: 医药生物-CXO与医药研发外包
archetype: 多肽药物与原料药CDMO混合平台
dominance_test: Not decided in this CXO group because the stronger question is peptide API and proprietary drug or generic-drug business rather than general CRO outsourcing.
moat_summary: Moat may come from peptide APIs; semaglutide and related peptide manufacturing; high gross margin; and R&D intensity; but this should be judged with peptide APIs and innovative-drug manufacturers.
advantage_summary: 2025 gross margin 62.64%; net margin 16.75%; R&D ratio 12.97%. Metrics are strong but the company is not a clean CXO peer and the ST status or governance context requires separate review.
weakness_summary: Mixing it into CXO would distort the peer-group rule. Reclassify before deciding watchlist status.
market_position_summary: Local financial data show strong 2025 margins and revenue growth but the business form is not comparable with CRO/CDMO service platforms.
source_backed_evidence: Local financial data plus future peptide/API source review required.
source_quality: Do you agree to reclassify ST诺泰 instead of deciding it here?
